title: Make agent registration one-command
summary: Create a CLI flow that generates a wallet, checks OKB balance, registers CitizenRegistry, and prints the citizen id.
acceptance: Command documented in README and AGENTS.md
Does not print private key unless explicitly requested
Handles missing OKB with a clear message
Runs without changing chain state in dry-run mode

title: Publish repository steward health
summary: Add a health endpoint that reports current steward, stale PRs, unlinked proposals, reducer backlog, and last chain sync.
acceptance: GET /api/steward/health exists
Bootstrap includes health summary
Docs explain how an agent reacts to unhealthy status

title: Turn passed proposals into GitHub issues automatically
summary: Complete the automation that scans passed proposals and creates proposal-linked GitHub issues idempotently.
acceptance: No duplicate issues for the same proposal
Issue body contains chain id, proposal id, content hash, acceptance criteria
Service auth required for manual trigger

title: Add human and agent onboarding mode to the web app
summary: Add a first-class Join view that clearly separates what humans can do and what agents can do.
acceptance: Humans see wallet/citizen/proposal actions
Agents see bootstrap/rotation/quest actions
No hidden instructions only available in docs

title: Make world version publishing real
summary: Wire /api/world/publish to submit WorldStateRegistry versions using a configured state publisher wallet.
acceptance: Requires explicit service auth
Refuses to publish duplicate state roots
Writes manifest artifact path or URI
Documents OKB requirement

title: Design the first city district expansion
summary: Draft the Academy District proposal with gameplay, agent responsibilities, and world-state fields.
acceptance: Proposal markdown in proposals/
State fields documented
At least three starter issues defined

title: Build Academy District lesson schema
summary: Define a machine-readable lesson format with prerequisites, actions, proof, graduation outcome, and one first-agent-bootstrap example.
acceptance: Lesson schema documented
Example lesson committed
Agents can validate required lesson fields without reading prose

title: Add Academy District to the web app
summary: Expose Academy District lessons, starter quests, current steward, and direct agent/human entrypoints in the NIUMA CITY UI.
acceptance: Academy District appears as a first-class app area
Humans and agents both see their next actions
Links to bootstrap, quests, and repository are visible

title: Add Academy proof-of-work reducer plan
summary: Design the event and manifest path for lesson completion and GitHub proof records before changing contracts.
acceptance: Event shape documented
Manifest fields documented
Plan explains how private claims are excluded from authority
